3276700.name: Scrubbin' Trubble
3276700.description:
Hold on to your bubbles! Scrubbin’ Trubble is a cooperative turn-based roguelike clean em’ up where you and your buddies each play one of six unique character classes to deal with some of the nastiest grime you’ve ever seen… and this filth fights back. Sometimes to get clean, you gotta get dirty. 

In The House, the cleaning and the fights never seem to end. Go it alone or team up with up to three other players to wipe out the Nasties infesting every inch. Think strategically and defeat foes to earn powerful upgrades for the whole team and their special abilities, working your way from one floor to the next. But don’t get too cocky; while running to the next stairs is always an option, if you end up fleeing too much or doing poorly, you may find yourself woefully unprepared to take on the increasingly dangerous detritus on subsequent levels, and if you hit a game over before you scrub out one of the Four Filths of the Apocalypse, you’ll need to start all over from the beginning.

Features:

  • Play solo or with up to four players in online co-op

  • Six different classes with unique skills and strengths to support the team

  • Upgrade your attacks to add new effects and powers

  • Take on pun-riddled Nasties like Mildude, Asbeastos, Refusphynx, and more

  • Wield items and equipment like "Wiper Rifle" and "Splash Bang" to clean up your foes

  • Approachable learning curve and quick sessions whether you have a little time, or a lot!

About Odd Object

Odd Object is a new independent game studio based in California and founded by Stevie Hryciw (The Indie Game Legend 3D, Catacomb Kids) and veteran animator and roguelike developer Tyriq Plummer (Cadence of Hyrule, Catacomb Kids, UFO 50). They work with a variety of creators to craft fresh, fun, and colorful games designed to be easy to pick up but hard to put down, combining depth with approachability.
